source.title: Rejected Take Off Distance OEI Clear Area Procedure, IBF Installed

notes: Figure 4-98 engine built from the approved exact vector extraction and semantic audit.
IBF 7000 logic enabled above 6800 kg on the IBF Installed profile.
Left panel semantic order: MAX OAT LIMIT dashed is separate; continuous families are 50, 40, 30, 20, 10, 0, -10, -20, -30, -40.
V65 micro-adjust: left OAT families shifted slightly downward to match the approved IBF 7000 page overlay.
